headline: Construction Quality Failures Cause 12 Building Collapses
context: CIDB recorded 12 partial or full building collapses involving occupied structures in 2025 up from 5 in 2021.

cards.big: 12 occupied buildings collapsed in Malaysia in 2025 doubling 2021 count
cards.sub: Rising structural failures point to systemic construction quality gaps

cards.big: 3 of 12 collapses involved buildings less than 10 years old
cards.sub: CIDB found substandard concrete and insufficient steel reinforcement

cards.big: Only 45% of construction sites underwent Stage 3 inspection in 2025
cards.sub: 1 inspector per 280 active sites makes comprehensive oversight impossible

cards.big: CIDB blacklisted 28 contractors but 18 continued operating under new names
cards.sub: Weak enforcement allows problematic contractors to reorganize and re-bid

cards.big: Building collapses test whether construction regulation has real enforcement teeth
12 building collapses trace back to construction quality failures that inspection regimes failed to prevent.
